description_long: This is a semi-hollow electric guitar with a natural wood finish and a single f-hole on the upper bout, reminiscent of classic Telecaster Thinline designs. The body is made of light-colored wood with visible grain patterns, and it features a metallic pickguard and control plate, both in a silver or chrome finish. The guitar has two single-coil pickups, a three-way selector switch, and two control knobs for volume and tone. The neck is also wood, with a matching headstock that holds six inline tuning pegs. The back of the guitar is plain, showing only the wood grain and a small access plate. The overall design is sleek and modern, with a blend of traditional and contemporary elements.
description: A natural-finish semi-hollow electric guitar with a single f-hole, chrome hardware, and a classic Telecaster-style body and headstock.
description_view_0: Front view showing the f-hole, chrome pickguard, pickups, control knobs, and the full neck with headstock.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the guitar's thin body depth and the protruding hardware components.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain wooden back with visible grain and a small access plate.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile emphasizing the body thickness and the edge of the pickguard.
attribute_headstock_design: Flat-topped, six-inline tuning pegs, no visible logo, classic Telecaster shape
